---
title: Tina Cloud Starter
blocks:
  - intro: Hi! I'm
    description: 'I enjoy transforming complex requirements into elegant, robust solutions.'
    social:
      - icon:
          name: BiLogoLinkedin
          color: foreground
          style: float
        url: 'https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshua-s-williams'
        label: LinkedIn
      - icon:
          name: FaGithub
          color: foreground
          style: float
        url: 'https://github.com/jswill88'
        label: GitHub
    cta:
      icon:
        name: BiLogoGmail
        color: foreground
        style: float
      url: 'emailto:joshuasrwilliams@gmail.com'
      label: Email
    image:
      src: /uploads/IMG_7513.jpg
      alt: Josh Williams Profile Picture
      blurDataURL: >-
        data:image/jpeg;base64,
    _template: hero
  - title: About Me
    sectionId: about
    body: >
      I’m a software engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web
      applications using TypeScript, React, and Node.js. I’ve worked on
      production systems in Agile environments, delivering features end-to-end,
      improving performance, and solving real-world engineering problems. This
      includes fixing CI pipelines that unblock teams and optimizing data
      workflows that save hours of time.


      I enjoy building products that people actually use, whether that’s
      high-traffic public-facing applications or creative tools like a music
      composition app I built using Tone.js. My background in music shapes how I
      approach engineering. I value structure, collaboration, and iteration, and
      I’m always thinking about how individual pieces come together into a
      cohesive system.


      I’m especially interested in full-stack development, building reliable
      systems, and continuing to grow as an engineer by tackling complex,
      meaningful problems.
    _template: about
  - title: Technologies
    pills:
      - pillId: javascript
      - pillId: react
      - pillId: node-js
      - pillId: express
      - pillId: typescript
      - pillId: next-js
      - pillId: graphql
      - pillId: mongodb
      - pillId: postgresql
      - pillId: jest
      - pillId: mocha
      - pillId: react-testing-library
    _template: pillTags
  - title: Projects
    sectionId: projects
    body: >
      ### Open Source - Tone.js


      Contributed to Tone.js by implementing a reverse delay audio effect
      ([GitHub](https://github.com/Tonejs/Tone.js/commit/1cb07e6127b6054b45b4b3d1fd2dfe6f95aaa769)),
      with changes merged into the development branch.
    cards:
      - title: Cake Pop
        primaryImage:
          src: /uploads/CakePop.gif
          alt: cake pop desktop
          blurDataURL: >-
            data:image/jpeg;base64,
        secondaryImage:
          src: /uploads/CakePopMobile.gif
          alt: cake pop mobile
          blurDataURL: >-
            data:image/jpeg;base64,
        links:
          - label: Live Site
            url: 'https://cake-pop.netlify.app/'
          - label: GitHub
            url: github.com/jswill88/cake-pop
        description: >
          A full-stack music composition app that lets users create and save
          custom musical loops with dynamic tempo and chord progression logic.
        pills:
          - pillId: tone
          - pillId: javascript
          - pillId: react
          - pillId: node-js
          - pillId: mongodb
          - pillId: express
    _template: projectCardsSection
  - title: Experience
    sectionId: experience
    body: ''
    entries:
      - thumbnail:
          src: /uploads/granicusinc_logo.jpeg
          alt: Granicus Logo
          blurDataURL: >-
            data:image/jpeg;base64,
        heading: Software Engineer
        subheading: Granicus • 2024-2025
        body: >
          I worked on a CRM platform using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and
          GraphQL, helping deliver new features and improvements in a
          collaborative Scrum environment. I contributed across the stack, from
          building UI components to supporting backend data workflows and
          integrations.


          One highlight was resolving a CI issue that was blocking test runs,
          which eliminated repeated pull request work and saved the team time
          each week. I also helped onboard early clients to the first production
          release, ensuring a smooth rollout of the platform.
      - heading: Front End Web Developer
        subheading: Granicus • 2021 - 2024
        body: >
          As a Front End Developer, I built and maintained high-traffic
          public-facing web applications for clients including Visit Las Vegas,
          Visit Norway, and Visit Jamaica. I worked closely with designers and
          developers to turn Figma and Adobe XD designs into responsive,
          production-ready interfaces.


          I focused on performance and reliability across multiple sites, and
          built automation scripts using Node.js and MongoDB that reduced a key
          data workflow from over an hour to just a few minutes. I also helped
          develop a system to support multilingual content for international
          websites.
      - heading: Education
        body: |
          #### **Oregon State University**

          B.S. Computer Science (In Progress)

          #### **Code Fellows**

          Certificate, Advanced Software Development in Full-Stack JavaScript

          #### **University of Nevada, Las Vegas**

          M.M. Jazz Performance • B.M. Jazz Studies • B.A. Music History
    _template: sectionEntries
---
